laws.title: Public Law 23-165 | 2nd Amendment Protection Act (2APA)
laws.status_basis: The source report classifies the law as repealed, but also records that its operative amendment has already been incorporated into title 18.
laws.chronology: No later law in the reviewed materials undoes the incorporated amendment; the repeal status is historical, not a reason to remove the existing Code change.
laws.repeal_transfer_redesignation: The enactment amends 18 U.S.C. 930(g)(1) and includes a rule-of-construction clause; no transfer or redesignation chain was resolved.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch contains the amended Federal facility definition in 18 U.S.C. 930(g)(1) and a USAR amendment note for Pub. L. 23-165.

provision_disposition.operative_character: rule of construction for the firearms-possession prohibition

recommended_actions: Leave the amended 18 U.S.C. 930(g)(1) text and history note in place.
Do not add a separate insertion for SEC 4(2).
Keep the repeal status as historical metadata only.

laws.title: Public Law 23-168 | Affirming Innovation Act
laws.status_basis: The source report classifies the law as active and permanent, and the branch already contains the 29 U.S.C. 208 reoccupation.
laws.chronology: No later law in the reviewed materials touches the reoccupied section number.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch contains a full replacement section 208, a prior-provisions note, and a USAR amendment note for Pub. L. 23-168.

provision_disposition.operative_character: reoccupies 29 U.S.C. 208 with new non-compete limitations and exceptions
enforcement and penalty clause with no safe code host

recommended_actions: Keep the reoccupied 29 U.S.C. 208 text, prior-provisions note, and USAR amendment note in place.
Do not invent a subsection for SEC 3(b).
Keep the act marked current.
